title: 💻 10 Essential Claude Code Best Practices You Need to Know
content:

# 10 Essential Claude Code Best Practices You Need to Know. The author compiled 84 best practices for Claude Code, covering everything from prompting to CLAUDE.md configuration, skills management, and debugging strategies. As a long-time Claude Code user, I spent over two hours going through every single practice. Boris himself has mentioned this multiple times, and it should be common knowledge for Claude Code users by now. In this mode, Claude only researches and plans without writing code. The repository offers a refreshingly clear-headed suggestion: native Claude Code handles small tasks better than any complex workflow. While Claude Code in the official IDE offers an excellent experience, there are other ways to access Claude’s powerful capabilities that you might want to explore:. Both platforms offer competitive pricing and additional features beyond the standard Claude Code experience, giving you more flexibility in how you leverage Claude’s capabilities across different projects and use cases. | Claude Code Skills: The Official Playbook from Anthropic's Engineering Team  Beginners | 0 | 128 | March 20, 2026 |.

title: 💻 Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work. If you’re ready to move beyond the “ask and pray” approach to something that actually works consistently, here’s what I’ve learned about making Claude Code genuinely useful. But the real power comes from asking Claude to make a plan before coding and explicitly telling it not to code until you’ve confirmed that its plan looks good. The biggest mental shift for me was stopping thinking of Claude Code as a tool and starting to think of it as a junior developer who’s incredibly fast but needs good direction. After implementing these practices consistently, my Claude Code sessions became dramatically more predictable and useful. Plan first, think appropriately hard, collaborate actively, and teach Claude about your specific context through .claude files. ## I Stopped Vibe Coding and Started “Prompt Contracts” — Claude Code Went From Gambling to Shipping. ### Anthropic just launched their Claude Code in Action course, and I’ve just passed — how about you?

[Continue with the Quickstart →](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/quickstart). See [advanced setup](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/setup) for installation options, manual updates, or uninstallation instructions. ## [​](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview#what-you-can-do). *   [Cloud scheduled tasks](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/web-scheduled-tasks) run on Anthropic-managed infrastructure, so they keep running even when your computer is off. *   [Desktop scheduled tasks](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/desktop#schedule-recurring-tasks) run on your machine, with direct access to your local files and tools. *   [`/loop`](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/scheduled-tasks) repeats a prompt within a CLI session for quick polling. *   Message [Dispatch](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/desktop#sessions-from-dispatch) a task from your phone and open the Desktop session it creates. *   Hand off a terminal session to the [Desktop app](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/desktop) with `/desktop` for visual diff review. ## [​](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview#use-claude-code-everywhere). ## [​](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview#next-steps). title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format text. claude -p "Process this large dataset" --output-format stream-json`. claude -p "Analyze this code" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format json | jq '.usage'`. session_id=$(claude -p "Start review" --output-format json \. claude -p "Continue the review" --resume "$session_id"`. claude -p "Review the code" \. - claude -p "Analyze maintainability issues" --output-format json. - claude -p "Check for performance bottlenecks" --output-format json. Claude Code's batch processing is built on two pillars: `/batch` and headless mode (`claude -p`). Claude Code v2.1.63 Release Notes — `/batch` and `/simplify` were introduced in this version.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing - Claude API Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Message Batches API. The Message Batches API is a powerful, cost-effective way to asynchronously process large volumes of Messages requests. ## How the Message Batches API works. When you send a request to the Message Batches API:. Any request that you can make to the Messages API can be included in a batch. ## How to use the Message Batches API. **Test your batch requests with the Messages API**. Validation of the `params` object for each message request is performed asynchronously, and validation errors are returned when processing of the entire batch has ended. echo "Batch $MESSAGE_BATCH_ID is still processing...". Once batch processing has ended, each Messages request in the batch has a result. `{"custom_id":"my-second-request","result":{"type":"succeeded","message":{"id":"msg_014VwiXbi91y3JMjcpyGBHX5","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hello again! {"custom_id":"my-first-request","result":{"type":"succeeded","message":{"id":"msg_01FqfsLoHwgeFbguDgpz48m7","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hello! curl --request POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages/batches/$MESSAGE_BATCH_ID/cancel \. The Message Batches API supports prompt caching, allowing you to potentially reduce costs and processing time for batch requests. ### Can I use the Message Batches API with other API features? ### Can I use prompt caching in the Message Batches API?

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing with Message Batches API
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch processing with Message Batches API. # Batch Processing with Message Batches API. Message Batches allow you to process large volumes of Messages requests asynchronously and cost-effectively. Let's start with a simple example that demonstrates creating and monitoring a batch of message requests. response = client.beta.messages.batches.create(requests=batch_requests). print(f"Batch ID: {response.id}"). Now let's monitor the batch processing status:. print(f" Succeeded: {batch_result.request_counts.succeeded}"). print(f" Errored: {batch_result.request_counts.errored}"). print(f" Processing: {batch_result.request_counts.processing}"). print(f" Canceled: {batch_result.request_counts.canceled}"). print(f" Expired: {batch_result.request_counts.expired}")`. Once the batch is complete, we can retrieve and process the results:. print(f"\nBatch {batch.id} Summary:"). print(f"Status: {batch.processing_status}"). print(f"Created: {batch.created_at}"). print(f"Ended: {batch.ended_at}"). print(f"Expires: {batch.expires_at}"). for result in client.beta.messages.batches.results(batch_id):. print(f"Content: {result.result.message.content[0].text[:200]}..."). ## Example 2: Advanced Batch Processing for Different Message Types. This example demonstrates more advanced usage, including error handling and processing different types of requests in a single batch including a simple message, a message with a system prompt, a multi-turn message, and a message with an image. response = client.beta.messages.batches.create(requests=batch_requests). print(f"Error creating batch: {e}"). print(f"Complex batch ID: {complex_batch_id}")`.
